              MILITARY GOVERNMENT O F SANTO DOMINGO.
                        Executive Order No. 790.
                 AMENDING THE “LEY BOBRE REGISTRO Y
4                   CQNSERVACION DE HIPQTECAS”.

             By virtyc of t k powers vested in the Xilitary G i o v m a n a k

of Santo Domingo, t h e following Executive Order is hereby pi*:-
mulgated:
    ARTICLE 1. Article 33 of the "LEY SOBKE RFLiSX'RO
Y CONSERVACION D E HIPOTECAS" of June 21, 189G, as
amended by Executive Order No. 665, is hereby f u r t h e r amended
by adding t h e following a t t h e end thereof:
    "Provided further, t h a t fees for the transcription of t h e
documents mentioned in Article 31 shfall be at t h e r a t e of one-
tenth of one per cent, and no surcharge shall be exacted."
        ARTICLE 2. In any case where, prior to t h e publication of
t h i s Executive Order, an embargo has been transcribed and a fee
of one-half of one per cent, plus t h e recargo fiscal, hds been yaid
as preFcribed in Article 3 and Article 10 of Executive Order No.
66.5, if the property covered by th: embargo shall be sold and t h e
on7nership thereof transferred thereby, 110 additional fee shall be
impomd or collected, except a fee of one-tmth of one per cent.
     ARTICLE 3. A11 laws o r parts of laws in conflict h x e w i t h
are hereby repealed.
